code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut stop = false
  for tok in tokens
    if not stop
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        if n < 0
          stop = true
        else
          sum = sum + n
        end
      when None
        stop = true
      end
    end
  end
  println("partial=#{sum}")
end
